[Git push / merge] 
 Commits code, documentation, and test results to main branch 
[GitHub]

softwareSystems.description: Team repositories that invoke the toolkit via workflow_call or daily schedule.
softwareSystems.name: Team GitHub Repositories

relationships.description:
[workflow_call / schedule] 
 Invokes toolkit as a reusable workflow after CI/CD completion or on daily cron (9pm ET) 
[GitHub Actions]

[Invokes] 
 Calls the main workflow orchestrator reusable workflow 
[GitHub Actions]

[workflow_run artifact] 
 CI/CD run produces Jest, Cypress, Lighthouse coverage artifacts 
[GitHub Actions Artifact]

softwareSystems.description: Central hub for standards, security intelligence, dependency tracking, and tech radar within Audi RED.
softwareSystems.name: Audi RED Documentation Portal

components.description: Validates required inputs and secrets before downstream jobs run.
components.name: Input Validation Job

relationships.description:
[Triggers] 
 Passes validated inputs downstream 
[GitHub Actions]

components.description: Resolves app_type from input or auto-detects from Cypress/Jest config.
components.name: Project Type Detection Job

relationships.description:
[Reads] 
 Resolves destination path, branch, and MSI parent page ID 
[File System]

components.description: Maps app_type to destination path, branch, and MSI parent page ID.
components.name: App Type Profiles Config

components.description: Captures and emits final status of all workflow jobs.
components.name: Observability Summary Job

containers.description: Core workflow (audired-tookit.yml). Validates inputs, detects project type, and sequences downstream jobs.

relationships.description:
[Sequences] 
 MDX validation must pass before diagram generation 
[GitHub Actions]

components.description: Generates workspace.json and PNG diagrams from workspace.dsl files.

relationships.description:
[Sequences] 
 Diagrams generated before metrics injection 
[GitHub Actions]

components.description: Injects CI coverage scores into project_metrics.mdx.

relationships.description:
[Sequences] 
 Enriched docs folder pushed to portal 
[GitHub Actions]

components.description: Copies validated docs to the profile-resolved branch in RED Docs Portal.
components.name: Doc Publisher

relationships.description:
[Git commit] 
 Pushes validated and enriched docs to portal repository 
[DOC_SYNC_KEY / rsync + Git]

containers.description: Validates docs, generates Structurizr diagrams, embeds CI metrics, and pushes to RED Docs Portal.

relationships.description:
[Git commit] 
 Pushes docs folder to profile-resolved branch (docs-sync/feature-apps, docs-sync/backend-services, etc.)

name: AudiRED Toolkit Orchestrator

containerViews.description: Shows the reusable GitHub Actions containers that make up the toolkit: the workflow orchestrator, doc sync, test collection, metadata kit, and Confluence sync.
containerViews.name: Container View: AudiRED Toolkit Orchestrator
containerViews.title: C4 Level 2 - Container Diagram: AudiRED Toolkit Orchestrator

deploymentViews.description: Shows where each toolkit component runs - all jobs execute on GitHub Actions runners within the RED-Internal-Development organisation.
deploymentViews.name: Deployment View: Production
deploymentViews.title: Deployment Diagram: AudiRED Toolkit Orchestrator (Production)

systemContextViews.description: Team repositories invoke the AudiRED Toolkit after CI/CD completion. The toolkit orchestrates documentation sync, test data collection, and metadata aggregation - publishing outputs to the RED Documentation Portal and Confluence Cloud.
systemContextViews.name: System Context View: AudiRED Toolkit Orchestrator
systemContextViews.title: C4 Level 1 - System Context: AudiRED Toolkit Orchestrator
